/opt/homebrew/bin/aarch64-elf-ar qc ../../libviperssh.a CMakeFiles/viperssh.dir/ssh.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/viperssh.dir/ssh_auth.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/viperssh.dir/ssh_channel.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/viperssh.dir/ssh_crypto.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/viperssh.dir/sftp.cpp.obj
/opt/homebrew/bin/aarch64-elf-ranlib ../../libviperssh.a
